title: Replace text
description: This mod allows you to replace any text sent by you in chat. Prevents typos and profanity if setup correctly
body:
This mod allows you to replace any text sent by you in the chat. You can automatically replace profanity with nice words or shortcuts with full words.

Usage:

/replace add <word number 1>: This command adds word number 1 as the word to replace and prompts you to type the replacement word.

/replace list: Displays all the registered words to be replaced and their replacements.

/replace remove: The selected word will be removed from the replacement list.

Examples:

/replace add w8 [ENTER] wait: Whenever you type "w8" in any message or command, it will be automatically corrected to "wait."

/replace add tysm [ENTER] thank you so much: This will replace "tysm" with "thank you so much."

Legal: This mod is intended for good use only. Using this mod to prank or get banned, for you or anyone, is unethical, and I do not take responsibility. Feel free to use this mod in your mod pack and/or modify the mod, as long as you retain me as the author.

Depencendies:
Either Fabric API or QFAPI & QSL is required for this mod to function properly

Having issues:

First, go into your ./minecraft folder and delete the file "replacetext.atd."
Second, re-download and reinstall the mod. If this didn't help, post your issue on my GitHub."
